snippet.title: The Fantastic Four: First Steps | Final Trailer | Only in Theaters July 25
snippet.description:
In ONE MONTH, Marvel Studios’ The Fantastic Four: First Steps arrives in theaters July 25.

Watch the new trailer and get tickets now: https://fandango.com/FantasticFour

► SUBSCRIBE to the channel to get notified when new Marvel videos are posted: https://www.youtube.com/marvel?sub_confirmation=1

► SUBSCRIBE to Disney+ to stream all of your favorite Marvel shows and movies: https://www.disneyplus.com/

Follow on social media to get the latest news and announcements from Marvel:

TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@marvel
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/marvel
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Marvel
